Right between the path and the lake. These area lot of work to open (you'll need a hammer and a hard surface) and there's not much meat, but they're tasty and free! Access: Public.

Three large bushes easily accessible from the staff parking lot. Pretty sure the ditch setback area is city-owned, but it might belong to the nursing home. Just be courteous if you come across anybody.
